## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pasan (`npm run test:unit`)
- [ ] Lint pasa (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Type check pasa (`npm run type-check`)
- [ ] Probado manualmente en local
- [ ] No introduce variables de entorno sin documentar
- [ ] No expone datos sensibles
